productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Brown Lifestyle Casual Shoe
description: CompositionBrown shoes with suede leather upper, phylon midsole, carbon rubber sole.shoe care1. Rub surface With soft, clean cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThis pair of semi-formal shoes exude a sense of sophistication, with their padded collar and tongue, and suede body. The light brown stitches on the dark brown suede upper and an artificial lacing on the sides make the pair of footwear a strong style statement. The soft fabric shoe lining is comfortable on the feet and keeps them safe from shoe bite. The cushioned insole provides comfort to the foot, while the shock absorbing lightweight midsole makes the pair appropriate for use on hard indoor surfaces. The high traction flexible outsole supports your natural body movement and walking posture. The outsole makes the shoe flexible, weather-resistant and easy to maintain through all seasons.
